title: Kew's More Blocks
description: Wanna have more blocks to build with? We've got you covered.
body:
Current Content:
- 205 new blocks
- 25 new items
- 523 new recipes
- new naturally generated stone types (Marble, Soapstone and Siltstone)
- new naturally generated nether ore (Black Quartz)


Planned Updates:

>1.2x.x Fabric:
>- Soon - v1.9.1 Love for the Nether Part 2
>- Soon - v1.9.2 Love for the Nether Part 3
